config.ka_core.title: RPG Tweaks Configuration
config.ka_core.blockAdvancementXP.toolti: When enabled, players will not receive experience from completing advancements.
config.ka_core.logXPBlocking.tooltip: Logs detailed information about XP blocking to the console.
config.ka_core.enableCustomOreXP.tooltip: Enables the custom ore XP system. Configured blocks will drop custom XP amounts.
config.ka_core.logOreXP.tooltip: Logs detailed information about ore XP drops to the console.
